'''badhulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jilgie|jilgie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-dh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jilgie|jilgie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| badhulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bædhilith|bædhilith]] || [[word:bædhilij|bædhilij]] || [[word:bædhilish|bædhilish]] || [[word:bædhili|bædhili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:badhudhuluth|badhudhuluth]] || [[word:badhudhuluj|badhudhuluj]] || [[word:badhudhulush|badhudhulush]] || [[word:badhudhulu|badhudhulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:badhuluth|badhuluth]] || [[word:badhuluj|badhuluj]] || [[word:badhulush|badhulush]] || [[word:badhulu|badhulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:badhufluth|badhufluth]] || [[word:badhufluj|badhufluj]] || [[word:badhuflush|badhuflush]] || [[word:badhufluf|badhufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:badhuluthu|badhuluthu]] || [[word:badhuluju|badhuluju]] || [[word:badhulushu|badhulushu]] || [[word:badhuluku|badhuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:badhuluth|badhuluth]] || [[word:badhuluj|badhuluj]] || [[word:badhulush|badhulush]] || [[word:badhulu|badhulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:badhuluthul|badhuluthul]] || [[word:badhulujul|badhulujul]] || [[word:badhulushul|badhulushul]] || [[word:badhulukul|badhulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:badhuluthuthu|badhuluthuthu]] || [[word:badhulujuju|badhulujuju]] || [[word:badhulushushu|badhulushushu]] || [[word:badhuluku|badhuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:badhuluthun|badhuluthun]] || [[word:badhulujun|badhulujun]] || [[word:badhulushun|badhulushun]] || [[word:badhulukun|badhulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:badhuluthuoro|badhuluthuoro]] || [[word:badhulujuoro|badhulujuoro]] || [[word:badhulushuoro|badhulushuoro]] || [[word:badhulukuoro|badhulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
